<!--
First PR? Welcome. You do not need to fill every box perfectly — just tell us
what you changed and why. Maintainers will help with the rest.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. What does it do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / product family
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Hardware / CAD / BOM
- [ ] Firmware
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] Scoped to one product, module, or workflow where possible
- [ ] Build and type checks pass for the package I touched
- [ ] Docs updated if I changed an API, MQTT topic, wiring, or setup step
- [ ] Screenshot or short clip attached for any UI or hardware behavior change

## Safety (required for any hardware / firmware / motion change)

<!-- Skip this section if your change is docs- or UI-only. -->

- [ ] E-STOP and watchdog behavior preserved
- [ ] No arm/door/motor motion without a confirmation modal (app) or safety state (firmware)
- [ ] No secrets, WiFi credentials, API keys, or device IDs hardcoded
- [ ] Stepper motors disabled when idle

## Anything you're unsure about?

<!-- It's fine to ask here. "I wasn't sure how to test X" is a useful note. -->
